mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_buy_activity WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_activity (activity_id, required_people, valid_duration, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{requiredPeople}, #{validDuration}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_activity SET required_people = #{requiredPeople}, valid_duration = #{validDuration}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
